resources.string: Detects YouTube Shorts, TikTok short-video feed, Instagram Reels, and Facebook Reels locally when protection is enabled and closes the blocking screen after you leave them.
Parent PIN is required to allow short videos or change protection.
Optional parent-controlled Device Admin protection that makes uninstall harder while active.
Optional tamper protection makes Shorts Blocker Kids harder to uninstall while active. It does not replace Accessibility protection and does not block Settings or perform hidden system actions.
Tamper protection is active. Disabling it can allow Shorts Blocker Kids to be uninstalled or protection to be changed without the parent PIN.
